This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Initial (h1 slotted into slot_a): #has_heading_3
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(255, 255, 0)" but got "rgb(128, 128, 128)"
[FAIL] h1.slot = 'b': #has_heading_5
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(0, 128, 0)" but got "rgb(128, 128, 128)"
[FAIL] h1.slot = 'nonexistent': #has_heading_1
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(255, 0, 0)" but got "rgb(128, 128, 128)"
[FAIL] h1.slot = 'a': #has_heading_3
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(255, 255, 0)" but got "rgb(128, 128, 128)"
[FAIL] slotA.name = 'c': #has_heading_1
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(255, 0, 0)" but got "rgb(128, 128, 128)"
[FAIL] slotB.name = 'a': #has_heading_5
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(0, 128, 0)" but got "rgb(128, 128, 128)"
[FAIL] Reset slot names: #has_heading_3
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(255, 255, 0)" but got "rgb(128, 128, 128)"
[FAIL] slotA.remove(): #has_heading_1
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(255, 0, 0)" but got "rgb(128, 128, 128)"
[FAIL] Re-insert slot_a: #has_heading_3
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(255, 255, 0)" but got "rgb(128, 128, 128)"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
